Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: She stops in her tracks, noticing you at long last.

Entries.Name: Business Kweebec
Entries.Line: No, not you! I have something to deal with at home. I'll call you back in an hour.

Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: After that last bit, which doesn't seem to have been aimed at you, the light of the rune in her hand dies down.

Line.Text: As for you, human, I don't think we've met before. And my business associates are generally very hard to forget. What brings you here?
